title: "R.26 Pre-contractual Due Diligence"
type: "requirement"
status: "draft"
---

# Pre-contractual due diligence

Conduct thorough due diligence on prospective ICT third-party service providers, assessing appropriateness, risks of concentration, sub-outsourcing, and compliance with applicable regulatory requirements.
